lines.speaker: Fairy chef
lines.text: 'Ello, sugar. I'm afraid I can't gossip right now, I've got a cake in the oven.

sections.title: Attempting to take the nearby chocolate bar

lines.speaker: Fairy chef
lines.text: Oi you! Did you think I didn't see that? That's my chocolate bar, that is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry. I didn't realise it belonged to anybody.

lines.speaker: Fairy chef
lines.text: That's alright, honey. You look a bit thin anyway. Take it if you need it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Fairy chef
lines.text: Sorry dearie, no, but I have seen a sign with similar marks near the mysterious ruins. You know, the ones that lead you to the Cosmic Rune Altar.
